---
title: "Function Reference"
subtitle: "All documented R functions — alphabetical by name"
toc: false
sidebar: false
---

A complete index of every function covered in this reference. Click any card to open the full documentation page.

---

## Import & Create

<div class="fn-card-grid">
<a href="read-csv.qmd" class="fn-card">
<span class="fn-name">read_csv( )</span>
<span class="fn-pkg">readr</span>
<p>Import a CSV file as a tibble.</p>
</a>
<a href="tibble.qmd" class="fn-card">
<span class="fn-name">tibble( )</span>
<span class="fn-pkg">tibble</span>
<p>Create a tidy data frame from column vectors.</p>
</a>
</div>

---

## Transform

<div class="fn-card-grid">
<a href="mutate.qmd" class="fn-card">
<span class="fn-name">mutate( )</span>
<span class="fn-pkg">dplyr</span>
<p>Add or transform columns in a data frame.</p>
</a>
</div>

---

## Report

<div class="fn-card-grid">
<a href="cat.qmd" class="fn-card">
<span class="fn-name">cat( )</span>
<span class="fn-pkg">base R</span>
<p>Print labelled results with units to the console.</p>
</a>
<a href="round.qmd" class="fn-card">
<span class="fn-name">round( )</span>
<span class="fn-pkg">base R</span>
<p>Round to a fixed number of decimal places.</p>
</a>
<a href="signif.qmd" class="fn-card">
<span class="fn-name">signif( )</span>
<span class="fn-pkg">base R</span>
<p>Round to a given number of significant figures.</p>
</a>
</div>
